title: Big K Woodies Firelighters, Bag of 24 Natural Wood Wool BBQ Firelighters
description: Product Description big k’s woodies firelighters are the perfect way to light barbecues and other fires. Made from 100% natural wood wool and wax, they light easily and quickly, producing minimal smoke and very little odour. Our woodies firelighters are safe and easy to use, and they'll the perfect way to light any of our range of Big K charcoals. Simply use the firelighters as directed by the lighting instructions for each type of charcoal. With a burn time of approximately 7 minutes, There’s plenty of time to get your barbecue going. Try big k’s woodies firelighters today For an easy way to get cooking. Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 20 Millmead Rd Tottenham Hale London N17 9Qu
